downloaded_assets.title: Futuristic Riyadh 2026
downloaded_assets.description: Dazzling night view of Riyadh's futuristic architectural landscape.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Wide cinematic shot of modern skyscrapers at night with glowing blue and violet lights, featuring high-tech glass facades and sleek structural designs.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant: deep blue (#0F2634), vibrant purple (#4A4146), and cool white highlights.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfectly represents the '2026 GCC' vision with futuristic architecture and high-tech lighting.

downloaded_assets.title: Dubai Museum of the Future
downloaded_assets.description: Iconic futuristic landmark in Dubai for 2026 government portals.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Daytime shot of the Museum of the Future, showcasing its unique calligraphic facade and silver metallic structure against a bright blue sky.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant: silver metallic (#ACBEC8) and sky blue (#7E87A4).
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Globally recognized symbol of GCC innovation, ideal for a modern government portal.

downloaded_assets.title: Digital Security Grid
downloaded_assets.description: High-tech matrix background for secure payment surfaces.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: A dense grid of glowing blue digital code and geometric patterns on a dark background.
downloaded_assets.color_notes: Dominant: deep tech blue (#0F81B3) on black.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Provides the 'Security Grid' requested for KSA/UAE portals, creating a sense of trust.

downloaded_assets.title: Glassmorphism Soft Mesh
downloaded_assets.description: Soft mesh gradient background for modern card UI overlays.
downloaded_assets.visual_description: Dreamy blend of soft blue and white lights in a smooth, blurred mesh gradient.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Perfect base for glassmorphism UI components and high-res textures.

downloaded_assets.title: NAFATH New Logo
downloaded_assets.description: Official Saudi National Digital Identity logo.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Official mark for KSA NAFATH services.

downloaded_assets.title: STC Pay Official
downloaded_assets.description: Official branding for the STC Pay digital wallet.
downloaded_assets.why_it_was_chosen: Verified official logo via brand domain.

css_textures.description: Subtle dot grid for a technical/government feel.
Soft mesh radial gradients to layer over cityscape heroes.

usage_notes: Place 'hero-riyadh-futuristic.jpg' as the main landing hero for KSA-specific flows.
Use 'bg-security-grid.jpg' as a fixed background with low opacity (0.1-0.2) to simulate an encrypted portal.
The flags in 'real-mirrors/' should be used for the country selection dropdowns to ensure official 2026 accuracy.
Logos downloaded via 'get_logos' (knet, benefit, stcpay) are the highest quality official versions available.
